description: Five-phase investment strategy formulation pipeline: capital profile assessment, market cycle positioning, strategy formulation, portfolio construction targets, and strategy memo production. Coordinates specialist agents to translate available capital and market conditions into a structured investment strategy with allocation targets, concentration limits, and pacing models. Terminal deliverable is a DEPLOY/REVISE/HOLD verdict with an approved strategy memo handed off to fund-management or acquisition orchestrators.

validationRules.description: Total committed capital and available capital for deployment must be non-null and positive.
Net IRR target, equity multiple target, and preferred return hurdle must be specified.
Deployment start date, investment period end date, and fund maturity date must be specified.

passConditions.description: Capital profile document contains total committed capital, deployment timeline, return targets, leverage constraints, and investor mandate requirements.
Constraint matrix specifies geographic limits, asset class limits, concentration limits, and leverage policy.

conditionalConditions.description: Investor mandate contains conflicting or ambiguous requirements that must be resolved in strategy formulation.
Committed capital data is incomplete; pacing model will use conservative assumptions.

failConditions.description: Cannot determine total available capital or deployment timeline from provided inputs.

capitalProfile.description: Complete capital profile including committed capital, available capital, deployment timeline, return targets, and investor mandate constraints. Required by all downstream phases.

deploymentTimeline.description: Investment period start/end dates, fund maturity date, expected deployment pacing. Required by portfolio construction targets phase.

validationRules.description: Current cycle position must be classified as one of: recovery, expansion, hyper-supply, recession with supporting indicators.
Strategy performance matrix must map at least 4 strategy types against the current and projected cycle positions.

requiredDataKeys.description: Capital profile required to evaluate which strategies are feasible given capital constraints and return targets.
Deployment timeline required to assess cycle exposure over the investment period.

passConditions.description: Cycle position diagnosed with high confidence based on at least 5 supporting indicators.
At least 2 strategy recommendations generated with projected performance at current and forecasted cycle positions.

conditionalConditions.description: Current cycle position is at a transition point with indicators pointing in conflicting directions; strategy must account for multiple scenarios.

failConditions.description: Current cycle position and capital constraints eliminate all viable strategies from the performance matrix.

cycleAssessment.description: Current cycle position diagnosis with supporting indicators, direction of movement, and confidence level. Required by strategy formulation phase.

strategyMatrix.description: Strategy-by-cycle performance matrix showing historical and projected returns for each strategy type at the current cycle position. Required by strategy formulation phase.

validationRules.description: A primary strategy (core/core-plus/value-add/opportunistic) must be selected with rationale.
Property type allocation percentages must sum to 100%. Geographic allocation percentages must sum to 100%.
Return targets must be internally consistent: net IRR >= preferred return, equity multiple consistent with hold period and IRR.

requiredDataKeys.description: Capital constraints and return targets required to formulate achievable strategy.
Cycle position required to select optimal strategy type and timing.
Strategy performance matrix required to validate selected strategy against historical performance.

passConditions.description: Investment strategy document specifies strategy type, property type allocation, geographic allocation, leverage policy, hold period, and return targets.
Formulated strategy satisfies all investor mandate constraints from the capital profile.
Historical strategy performance at the current cycle position supports the stated return targets within reasonable confidence.

conditionalConditions.description: Return targets are achievable only with continued favorable cycle conditions; downside scenario produces below-target returns.
Geographic allocation concentrated in 2 or fewer MSAs; portfolio diversification risk flagged.

failConditions.description: No strategy formulation satisfies both investor mandate constraints and achievable return targets at the current cycle position.
Property type or geographic allocations conflict with leverage policy or hold period assumptions.

investmentStrategy.description: Complete investment strategy document with strategy type, property type allocation, geographic allocation, leverage policy, hold period, and return targets. Required by portfolio construction and strategy memo phases.

allocationTargets.description: Specific allocation targets by property type, geography, vintage, and strategy tier. Required by portfolio construction targets phase.

crossAgentValidations.description: Selected strategy type must be consistent with the cycle assessment recommendation. Value-add in recession without distress mandate is flagged.

validationRules.description: Single-asset, single-market, and single-property-type concentration limits must be specified as percentages of total NAV.
Pacing model must specify target deployment by quarter with cumulative deployment percentage across the investment period.
Minimum and maximum equity check sizes must be defined and consistent with total capital and concentration limits.

requiredDataKeys.description: Investment strategy required to translate into specific portfolio construction parameters.
Allocation targets required to build concentration limits and pacing model.
Total capital and deployment timeline required for pacing model and equity check sizing.

passConditions.description: Portfolio construction plan specifies concentration limits, pacing model, vintage targets, equity check ranges, and rebalancing triggers.
Construction plan parameters are internally consistent with the formulated investment strategy and capital profile.

conditionalConditions.description: Pacing model requires deploying more than 40% of capital in the first 12 months; execution risk flagged.

failConditions.description: Portfolio construction targets cannot be met given capital constraints, market size, and investment period duration.

portfolioConstructionPlan.description: Complete portfolio construction plan with concentration limits, pacing model, vintage targets, equity check ranges, and rebalancing triggers. Required by strategy memo and downstream fund management.

concentrationLimits.description: Explicit concentration limits by asset type, geography, single-asset, and tenant exposure. Required by acquisition orchestrator for deal-level compliance checks.

validationRules.description: Strategy memo must contain executive summary, capital profile, cycle analysis, strategy rationale, allocation targets, portfolio construction plan, risk analysis, and approval recommendation.

requiredDataKeys.description: Portfolio construction plan required for the construction targets section of the strategy memo.
Concentration limits required for the risk management section of the strategy memo.

passConditions.description: Complete strategy memo produced with all required sections and supporting analysis.

conditionalConditions.description: Strategy memo produced but flags open items requiring stakeholder input before deployment begins.

failConditions.description: Memo writer failed to produce a complete strategy memo after all retry attempts.

strategyMemo.description: Complete investment strategy memo with executive summary, capital profile, cycle analysis, strategy rationale, allocation targets, portfolio construction plan, and risk analysis. Terminal deliverable of the strategy pipeline.

verdictValues.DEPLOY: Strategy approved; pipeline hands off fund formation parameters and deal screening criteria to fund-management and acquisition orchestrators.
verdictValues.REVISE: Strategy framework sound but requires revision on specific parameters (leverage, allocation, pacing) before deployment begins.
verdictValues.HOLD: Strategy formulation deferred; market cycle conditions or capital availability do not support deployment at this time.

researchMemo.description: Market research memo with opportunity map and target profiles informing strategy formulation.

targetAcquisitionProfiles.description: Target acquisition profiles from research to align strategy with identified opportunities.

submarketScorecard.description: Submarket scorecards providing granular market data for geographic allocation decisions.

investmentStrategy.description: Approved investment strategy with deal screening criteria, return targets, and leverage policy for acquisition pipeline.

concentrationLimits.description: Concentration limits that the acquisition orchestrator must validate against before issuing a GO verdict.

portfolioConstructionPlan.description: Portfolio construction plan for pacing and vintage diversification context during deal evaluation.
